description: Trigger accuracy queries for the implement-it skill. Tests that the skill fires on concrete implementation requests backed by a defined task, and stays silent for exploratory, review, planning, or documentation requests. Design-decision queries test that the skill activates when a task signals a specific SOLID principle need.

should_trigger.query: implement the login endpoint from issue #42
implement the SendGrid email notification per the design task in tasks/010-email-notification.md, using Dependency Inversion and Adapter pattern
should_trigger.note: design-decision query: DIP signal with third-party SDK integration

should_trigger.query: code the payment processing strategy per the task in tasks/011-payment-processing.md, following Open/Closed Principle
should_trigger.note: design-decision query: OCP signal with multiple algorithm variants

should_trigger.query: fix the authentication bug described in TASK-101
refactor the UserService per the design spec in tasks/005-refactor-user-service.md
build the product search feature per the acceptance criteria in tasks/007-product-search.md
should_trigger.note: build verb + task file with explicit acceptance criteria

should_trigger.query: implement user email validation with AC-1 through AC-4
should_trigger.note: implement verb + inline acceptance criteria — no external task reference needed

should_trigger.query: code this story: as a user I want to filter products by category so I can find items faster
should_trigger.note: user story with defined scope — implement-it handles stories with clear acceptance criteria
finish verb + task file reference — resuming interrupted work

should_trigger.query: implement the retry logic described in the task
should_trigger.note: implement verb + reference to an existing task description

should_not_trigger.query: how does the authentication system work?
should_not_trigger.note: exploratory question about existing code, no implementation requested
documentation/explanation request, not an implementation task

should_not_trigger.query: should we use PostgreSQL or MongoDB for this feature?
should_not_trigger.note: architectural decision question with no defined task or acceptance criteria

should_not_trigger.query: plan the sprint tasks for next week
should_not_trigger.note: planning request — belongs to plan-it, not implement-it

should_not_trigger.query: review this pull request for the payment integration
should_not_trigger.note: code review request — belongs to review-it

should_not_trigger.query: what's the best approach for caching the product catalogue?
should_not_trigger.note: open-ended design question, no concrete task to implement

should_not_trigger.query: write documentation for the search API
debug why the login test is failing
should_not_trigger.note: exploratory debugging — investigating a failure, not implementing a defined fix

should_not_trigger.query: give me feedback on this code design
should_not_trigger.note: feedback/review request, not an implementation task

should_not_trigger.query: what would happen if we changed the ORM from SQLAlchemy to Django ORM?
should_not_trigger.note: speculative architectural question with no task or acceptance criteria
